title: Florida DBPR Takes Action Against Unlicensed Contractors in Lee and Monroe Counties
summary: DBPR executed undercover operations in Lee and Monroe counties targeting unlicensed contractors, resulting in 9 felony charges in Lee County and 8 citations in Monroe County.

title: Florida DBPR Opens Entry Period for 2025 Quota Beverage License Drawing
summary: DBPR opened the 2025 quota beverage license drawing period; 52 new licenses are available across 26 Florida counties including Lee, Collier, Charlotte, Sarasota, and Hendry.

title: Statewide Support of Enforcement Legislation to Strengthen Accountability and Protect Floridians
summary: DBPR is supporting HB 1341/SB 1394 to expand ABT enforcement authority, combat nitrous oxide abuse, and strengthen protections for minors across DBPR-regulated industries.

title: Florida DBPR Provides Resources to Protect Florida Businesses and Consumers Ahead of 2025 Hurricane Season
summary: DBPR provided consumer resources for the 2025 Atlantic Hurricane Season, including license verification tools and the Disaster Contractors Network to combat unlicensed activity after storms.
